wizardDescription: Set folder links, operator email, authorize Google, then generate userconfig.yml.
configExists: userconfig.yml was found. You can continue with business logic.
configMissing: userconfig.yml was not found. Complete setup wizard.
saveSuccessFs: userconfig.yml was saved via File System Access API.
saveFallbackDownload: Direct save is not available. Download userconfig.yml and place it near index.html.
saveFallbackManual: Manual fallback: create userconfig.yml near index.html and paste the content below.
wizard.folderInconsistency.heading: Folder Inconsistency Detected
wizard.folderInconsistency.message: More than one spreadsheet named "{title}" was found in the primary or mirror folder. Please open Google Drive and manually remove the duplicate files, keeping at most one in each folder.
